description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized panitumumab in combination with FOLFIRI for the second-line treatment of adult patients with wild-type RAS metastatic colorectal cancer (mCRPC) who have received first-line fluoropyrimidine-based chemotherapy (excluding irinotecan). Panitumumab's product information further states that evidence of wild-type RAS (KRAS and NRAS) status is required before initiating treatment with panitumumab and that mutational status should be deteremined by an experienced laboratory using validated test methods for detection of KRAS (exons 2, 3, and 4) and NRAS (exons 2, 3, and 4) variants.

contributions.description: Adding EMA approvals for use to database

indication.indication: Vectibix is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with wild-type RAS metastatic colorectal cancer (mCRC) in second-line in combination with FOLFIRI for patients who have received first-line fluoropyrimidine-based chemotherapy (excluding irinotecan).
indication.description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized panitumumab in combination with FOLFIRI for the second-line treatment of adult patients with wild-type RAS metastatic colorectal cancer (mCRPC) who have received first-line fluoropyrimidine-based chemotherapy (excluding irinotecan). Panitumumab's product information further states that evidence of wild-type RAS (KRAS and NRAS) status is required before initiating treatment with panitumumab and that mutational status should be deteremined by an experienced laboratory using validated test methods for detection of KRAS (exons 2, 3, and 4) and NRAS (exons 2, 3, and 4) variants.
